name: liquid-glass-frame
title: Liquid-Glass Frame
description: AF decorative chassis — multi-layer translucent frosted-glass material wrapping content (iPhone mocks, video frames, hero cards). 4-layer stack: transmission + frosting + edge highlights + AFVQ-blue underglow. Intensities: default, subtle, pulse-tinted. Status [damian-canon-needed] on exact blur/transmission stops — see ~/.claude/skills/af-design-catalog/PENDING-DAMIAN-VALIDATION.md. Applies on Experience-Page + Freigabe-Portal anchors only. Backdrop-filter is GPU-heavy — max ~3 per viewport.
